SessionStart.command: diff -q "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/requirements.txt" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/requirements.txt" >/dev/null 2>&1 || (mkdir -p "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}" && cd "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}" && cp "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/requirements.txt" . && python3 -m venv venv 2>/dev/null; . venv/bin/activate && pip install -q -r requirements.txt) || rm -f "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/requirements.txt"
